description: Configure a secure investigative journalism workspace in Chrome following the protocol at ~/Desktop/opsec_protocol.txt. Organize research bookmarks into folders named 'Secure Comms', 'Public Records', 'Target Intel', and 'News Outlets', and delete the personal bookmarks for Netflix, Hulu, Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter. Block site permissions for Location, Camera, Microphone, and Background Sync. Enable anti-tracking by blocking third-party cookies, sending 'Do Not Track' requests, and disabling Safe Browsing. Add custom search engines 'pacer' and 'offshore'. Set the download directory to ~/Documents/Secure_Vault and enable the prompt for each download.
